result.userPrompt:
Generate a professional app called Barbershop Pro for US barbershops and salons.
Core entities: Customer, Stylist/Barber, Service (name, duration, price), Appointment, Product (retail inventory), Sale + Commission calculation.
Key screens: Dashboard (today bookings, staff utilization, daily revenue), Customer list with visit history, Appointment booking with stylist availability, Staff performance & commissions, Inventory.
LLM feature: suggests upsell services for a customer or shows "best time slots for walk-ins today".
Focus: Fast booking, staff management and retail sales for small service businesses.
language: en, pt-br

todoItems.title: Organize Requirements
todoItems.description: Gather and structure requirements for Barbershop Pro including core entities, screens, and LLM features.

todoItems.title: Discover Scope
todoItems.description: Define the functional scope covering appointments, staff management, retail sales, and commission tracking.

todoItems.title: Recommend Implementations
todoItems.description: Propose implementation patterns for fast booking, inventory tracking, and commission calculations.

todoItems.title: Create Solution Blueprint
todoItems.description: Design the overall architecture for the barbershop management solution.

todoItems.title: Define Master Data
todoItems.description: Model core master data entities: Customer, Stylist, Service, Product, and Appointment.

todoItems.title: Define Data Tables
todoItems.description: Specify persistence tables for appointments, sales transactions, inventory levels, and visit history.

todoItems.title: Define Metric Tables
todoItems.description: Create metric tables for daily revenue, staff utilization, and commission calculations.

todoItems.title: Define Workflows
todoItems.description: Map out booking, checkout, inventory update, and commission workflows.

todoItems.title: Configure LLM Agent
todoItems.description: Set up the LLM agent to suggest upsell services and identify best walk-in time slots.

todoItems.title: Design Application Pages
todoItems.description: Define Dashboard, Customer List, Appointment Booking, Staff Performance, and Inventory pages.

todoItems.title: Validate Solution Coverage
todoItems.description: Ensure all requirements including fast booking, staff management, and retail sales are addressed.

openDetails.title: Commission Calculation Rules
openDetails.description: Should commissions be a fixed percentage per service/product, tiered by sales volume, or customized per stylist?

openDetails.title: LLM Provider and Data Source
openDetails.description: Which LLM service should power upsell suggestions, and should recommendations use only visit history or also current inventory?

openDetails.title: Multi-Location Support
openDetails.description: Is this solution for a single barbershop location, or should it support multiple branches from the start?
